title: Star Wars Insider Exclusive Collector's Issue
content:
{{Top|rwm|title=''Star Wars Insider'' Exclusive Collector's Issue}} {{MagazineIssue |image=[[File:InsiderBestBuy.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Insider''
Exclusive Collector's Issue |editor= |cover artist= |contributors= |publisher=[[IDG Entertainment]] |release date=[[September 21]], [[2004]]{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20040915.html|text=''Star Wars'' ''Insider'' Exclusive Collector's Issue at Best Buy!}} |subscribers= |pages= |isbn= |issn= |genre= |issue=Best Buy Exclusive Collector's Issue |series=''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' }} The '''''Star Wars Insider'' Exclusive Collector's Issue''' was given out free starting on [[September 21]], [[2004]] by [http://www.bestbuy.com Best Buy] to customers who purchased either the [[original trilogy]] on [[Star Wars home video releases|DVD]] or [[LucasArts]]' ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]''. ==Contents== '''''[[Star Wars]]:'' A Cultural Icon by [[Stephen J. Sansweet]]''' ; Main Characters : [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] ; [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] : [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Dodonna]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], ; [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] : [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], Imperial [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]], [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin]], ; [[Alien/Legends|Aliens]] : [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] Guard, [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]], [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]], [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]], [[Bith/Legends|Bith]], [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], [[Rancor/Legends|Rancor]], [[Wampa/Legends|Wampa]] ; [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty Hunters]] : [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], [[IG-88B/Legends|IG-88]], [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]], [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]], [[4-LOM/Legends|4-LOM]], [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]] ; [[:Category:Alliance to Restore the Republic vehicles|Rebel Vehicles]] : [[Tantive IV/Legends|Tantive IV]], [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]], [[Snowspeeder/Legends|Snowspeeder]], [[Home One/Legends|Headquarters Frigate]], [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]] ; [[:Category:Galactic Empire vehicles|Imperial Vehicles]] : [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]], [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']], [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Imperial shuttle]], [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|Imperial Walker]], [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], [[Sail barge/Legends|Sail Barge]], [[Speeder bike/Legends|Speeder Bike]] ; [[Droid/Legends|Droids]] : [[8D8/Legends|8D8]], [[2-1B/Legends|2-1B]], [[EV-9D9/Legends|EV-9D9]], [[Probe droid/Legends|Probe Droid]], [[MSE-series|Mouse Droid]], [[R5-D4/Legends|R5-D4]], [[IT-O interrogation droid/Legends|Interrogator Droid]] '''[[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] DVD''' '''[[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] DVD''' '''[[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']] DVD''' '''''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'' Preview''' ==Sources== *{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20040915.html|text=''Star Wars'' ''Insider'' Exclusive Collector's Issue at Best Buy!}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{InsiderNav|76|77}} {{Interlang |es=Star Wars Insider Exclusive Collector's Issue |ka=Star Wars Insider Exclusive Collector's Issue |tr=Star Wars Insider Exclusive Collector's Issue }} [[Category:Star Wars Insider]]
